v0.1.0

Debug — Card Effect Test

Card Effect Test

Place one card by card_no and play vs CPU. You get a 6-card hand, 12 active Energy, and a full main deck. The test card starts on Stage (if it has [Activated]), in hand, or in Live storage as appropriate. Waiting Room and Live storage are auto-filled so skill prerequisites (e.g. Live in WR) are met. Requires ?debug in the URL.

Enter a card ID to preview

Enter a card ID to see where it will start.

Enter a card ID to see detected stage requirements.

Advanced board setup (optional)

Leave fields blank to keep defaults (6-card hand, 12 active Energy, auto stage seeding). Custom values apply after the test card and auto WR/Live/stage hints — useful for energy in wait, specific hand cards, or stage occupants.

You (P1)
CPU (P2)

v0.1.0

Debug — Bug Reports

Anti-softlock bug reports

Logged when you use the anti-softlock button during a match. Each report includes the card ID and the last 200 log lines. Requires ?debug in the URL.

v0.1.0

Debug — Replay

Debug Replay

Load a .json replay saved from an in-progress match (Save replay in the sidebar while ?debug is on). Step through recorded actions, then take control as the saver vs CPU. Requires ?debug and a guest session (signed out).

No file selected.

v0.1.0

The Unofficial Web Player

Options

Stuck in a match?

If ranked reconnects you to a broken or finished game, leave the active match record here. This counts as a resign if the game is still in progress.

Reset account

Delete all collection cards, deck presets, ranked stats, and booster progress. You will choose a new starter deck and begin again. This cannot be undone.

Flipping coin…

Opening Hand 🌸

Tap cards to mark for replacement. Hold a card to view its details. Tap again to unmark.

LIVE Phase — Set Cards

LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) in Live storage — yours stay face-up; opponent cards stay hidden until Performance. Draw 1 for each card placed, then end LIVE Phase. Performance reveals opponent storage at once.
